config.expression: if({view.custom.state.selected.status} = "Published", "badge badge-published", if({view.custom.state.selected.status} = "Draft", "badge badge-warn", if({view.custom.state.selected.status} = "Deprecated", "badge badge-muted", "")))

props.text: No route versions yet. Click + New Version to create the first draft.

customMethods.name: onItemChanged
loadActiveVersion
_emptyRoute
_bundleFor
_cloneBundle
customMethods.script:
b = dict(bundle or {})
	steps = []
	for s in (bundle or {}).get("steps", []) or []:
		steps.append(dict(s))
	b["steps"] = steps
	return b

customMethods.name: handleNewVersion
handleSaveDraft
customMethods.script:
draft = self.view.custom.state.editDraft or {}
	routeId = draft.get("id")
	if not routeId:
		BlueRidge.Common.Notify.toast("No draft selected", "Cannot save: no draft route is currently active.", "warning")
		return
	name = (draft.get("name") or "").strip()
	if not name:
		BlueRidge.Common.Notify.toast("Name required", "Enter a route name before saving.", "warning")
		return
	eff = (draft.get("effectiveFromDisplay") or "").strip() or None
	steps = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(draft.get("steps")) or []
	result = BlueRidge.Parts.RouteTemplate.saveAll(routeId, name, eff, steps)
	BlueRidge.Common.Ui.notifyResult(result, "Route draft saved")
	if result and result.get("Status"):
		self.refreshVersionList()
		self.loadActiveVersion()

customMethods.name: handlePublish
requestPublish
openDeprecateConfirm
customMethods.script:
sel = self.view.custom.state.selected or {}
	routeId = sel.get("id")
	ver = sel.get("versionNumber")
	if not routeId:
		return
	system.perspective.openPopup(
		id="mpp-confirm-destructive",
		view="BlueRidge/Components/Popups/ConfirmDestructive",
		modal=True,
		showCloseIcon=False,
		params={
			"title":        "Deprecate Route",
			"message":      "Deprecate v" + str(ver) + "? This retires the version from production. In-flight LOTs are unaffected.",
			"confirmLabel": "Deprecate",
			"cancelLabel":  "Cancel",
			"confirmClass": "btn btn-danger btn-sm",
			"replyMessage": "routeConfirmDeprecateResult",
		},
	)

customMethods.name: openDiscardDraftConfirm
customMethods.script:
draft = self.view.custom.state.editDraft or {}
	routeId = draft.get("id")
	if not routeId:
		return
	system.perspective.openPopup(
		id="mpp-confirm-destructive",
		view="BlueRidge/Components/Popups/ConfirmDestructive",
		modal=True,
		showCloseIcon=False,
		params={
			"title":        "Discard Draft",
			"message":      "Discard this draft and all unsaved edits? This cannot be undone.",
			"confirmLabel": "Discard",
			"cancelLabel":  "Cancel",
			"confirmClass": "btn btn-danger btn-sm",
			"replyMessage": "routeConfirmDiscardResult",
		},
	)

customMethods.name: handleAddStep
customMethods.script:
draft = dict(self.view.custom.state.editDraft or {})
	steps = list(draft.get("steps") or [])
	steps.append({
		"Id": None, "SequenceNumber": len(steps) + 1,
		"OperationCategoryId": None, "OperationCategoryName": "",
		"OperationTypeId": None, "OperationTypeCode": "", "OperationTypeName": "",
		"OperationTemplateId": None, "OperationCode": "", "OperationName": "",
		"OperationVersionNumber": None, "DataCollectionSummary": "",
		"IsRequired": True, "Description": None,
	})
	draft["steps"] = steps
	self.view.custom.state.editDraft = draft

customMethods.name: _swapSteps
customMethods.script:
draft = dict(self.view.custom.state.editDraft or {})
	steps = list(draft.get("steps") or [])
	if idxA < 0 or idxB < 0 or idxA >= len(steps) or idxB >= len(steps):
		return
	steps[idxA], steps[idxB] = steps[idxB], steps[idxA]
	draft["steps"] = steps
	self.view.custom.state.editDraft = draft

customMethods.name: _removeStep
customMethods.script:
draft = dict(self.view.custom.state.editDraft or {})
	steps = list(draft.get("steps") or [])
	if idx < 0 or idx >= len(steps):
		return
	del steps[idx]
	draft["steps"] = steps
	self.view.custom.state.editDraft = draft

customMethods.name: _applyCategoryChange
customMethods.script:
draft = dict(self.view.custom.state.editDraft or {})
	steps = list(draft.get("steps") or [])
	if idx < 0 or idx >= len(steps):
		return
	s = dict(steps[idx])
	s["OperationCategoryId"] = newCategoryId
	s["OperationCategoryName"] = ""
	for c in BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.categories) or []:
		if c.get("value") == newCategoryId:
			s["OperationCategoryName"] = c.get("label") or ""
			break
	s["OperationTypeId"] = None
	s["OperationTypeCode"] = ""
	s["OperationTypeName"] = ""
	s["OperationTemplateId"] = None
	s["OperationCode"] = ""
	s["OperationName"] = ""
	s["OperationVersionNumber"] = None
	s["DataCollectionSummary"] = ""
	steps[idx] = s
	draft["steps"] = steps
	self.view.custom.state.editDraft = draft

customMethods.name: _applyTemplateChange
customMethods.script:
draft = dict(self.view.custom.state.editDraft or {})
	steps = list(draft.get("steps") or [])
	if idx < 0 or idx >= len(steps):
		return
	s = dict(steps[idx])
	s["OperationTemplateId"] = newTemplateId
	s["OperationCode"] = ""
	s["OperationName"] = ""
	s["OperationVersionNumber"] = None
	s["DataCollectionSummary"] = ""
	if newTemplateId:
		for ot in (BlueRidge.Parts.RouteTemplate.getOperationTemplatesByCategory(s.get("OperationCategoryId")) or []):
			if ot.get("Id") == newTemplateId:
				s["OperationCode"] = ot.get("Code") or ""
				s["OperationName"] = ot.get("Name") or ""
				s["OperationVersionNumber"] = ot.get("VersionNumber")
				s["OperationTypeId"] = ot.get("OperationTypeId")
				s["OperationTypeName"] = ot.get("OperationTypeName") or ""
				break
		s["DataCollectionSummary"] = BlueRidge.Parts.OperationTemplate.getFieldSummary(newTemplateId)
	steps[idx] = s
	draft["steps"] = steps
	self.view.custom.state.editDraft = draft

customMethods.name: _applyReqChange
customMethods.script:
draft = dict(self.view.custom.state.editDraft or {})
	steps = list(draft.get("steps") or [])
	if idx < 0 or idx >= len(steps):
		return
	s = dict(steps[idx])
	s["IsRequired"] = bool(isRequired)
	steps[idx] = s
	draft["steps"] = steps
	self.view.custom.state.editDraft = draft

messageHandlers.script:
if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._swapSteps(idx, idx - 1)

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._swapSteps(idx, idx + 1)

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._removeStep(idx)

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._applyCategoryChange(idx, payload.get("newCategoryId"))

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._applyTemplateChange(idx, payload.get("newTemplateId"))

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._applyReqChange(idx, payload.get("isRequired"))
